subcommands.name: search
subcommands.output: returns source-backed recording memory hits without full transcript

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.output: shows metadata by default; --transcript expands full transcript

subcommands.name: inject
subcommands.output: returns source-cited prompt context without full transcript by default

subcommands.name: metrics
subcommands.output: summarizes import/search/injection latency and retrieval health
